summary: Iteration 13: Testing data distribution across 26 provinces and stats routes refactoring. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard shows 953 establishments, 4114 enseignants, 126804 eleves with 26 provinces chart. Provinces page shows interactive SVG map with all 26 provinces.
passed_tests: GET /api/stats/global returns 200 with all required fields
GET /api/stats/global returns repartition_par_province with 26 entries (all DRC provinces)
GET /api/stats/global returns total_etablissements = 953
GET /api/stats/notes returns 200 with par_matiere, distribution, par_trimestre arrays
GET /api/stats/notes par_matiere has 16 subjects with moyenne, count, min, max
GET /api/stats/notes par_trimestre has 3 trimesters
GET /api/stats/evolution returns 200 with mois array (12 months)
GET /api/stats/evolution returns cumul data (eleves, enseignants, etablissements)
GET /api/stats/province/maniema returns non-zero counts (29 etabs, 256 enseignants, 6960 eleves)
GET /api/stats/province/sankuru returns non-zero counts (22 etabs, 191 enseignants, 4976 eleves)
GET /api/stats/province/lualaba returns non-zero counts (27 etabs, 237 enseignants, 6442 eleves)
GET /api/stats/province/kinshasa returns non-zero counts (126 etabs, 467 enseignants, 15494 eleves)
All stats endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
Dashboard page loads with 953 establishments displayed
Dashboard shows chart with 26 provinces
Provinces page loads with data-testid='provinces-page'
Provinces page shows 26 Provinces Administratives stat card
Provinces page shows 60 Provinces Educationnelles stat card
Provinces page shows 567 Sous-Divisions stat card
Interactive SVG map renders all 26 provinces
Carte/Grille toggle buttons present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: routes_stats.py correctly extracted from server.py - clean separation of concerns
server.py reduced from 1482 to 1142 lines - good refactoring
All 26 provinces now have data (16 new provinces seeded successfully)
seed_data_creation: 16 new provinces seeded with establishments, teachers, students, grades. Total: 953 etabs, 4114 enseignants, 126804 eleves across 26 provinces.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stats routes now in separate file routes_stats.py (included in server.py via router). All 26 DRC provinces have data. Test file test_stats_routes.py covers all 5 stats endpoints with 23 test cases. Dashboard and Provinces pages working correctly with interactive SVG map.
